sentences.target: Tu peux me passer une pince, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø mə pase yn pɛ̃s sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux me passer une pince, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø mə pase yn pɛ̃s sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you pass me the pliers, please?
translations.pt: Pode passar-me o alicate, por favor.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đưa cho tôi cái kìm.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, δώσε μου την πένσα.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, gi meg tanga.
translations.sv: Var snäll och räck mig tången.
translations.fi: Ole kiltti ja ojenna minulle pihdit.
translations.ja: ペンチを取ってください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb phrase.
Present indicative, 2nd-person singular of the modal auxiliary 'pouvoir', selecting the infinitive 'passer'.
1st-person singular clitic object pronoun; indirect object (dative: 'to me') of 'passer'.
Infinitive main verb governed by the modal 'peux'; here meaning 'to hand/give'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pince'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (theme) of 'passer'.
Elided subordinating conjunction before vowel (from 'si'); part of the fixed polite formula.
3rd-person singular personal pronoun; subject of 'plaît' within the formula.
2nd-person singular clitic indirect object pronoun; complements 'plaît' ('pleases you').
Present indicative, 3rd-person singular of 'plaire'; head of the impersonal polite expression.

sentences.target: J'ai perdu ma pince à cheveux ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒe pɛʁdy ma pɛ̃s a ʃəvø sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: J'ai perdu ma pince à cheveux ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒe pɛʁdy ma pɛ̃s a ʃəvø sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: I lost my hair clip this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana perdí mi pinza del pelo.
translations.de: Ich habe heute Morgen meine Haarspange verloren.
translations.it: Stamattina ho perso la mia pinza per capelli.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上把发夹弄丢了。
translations.ru: Я сегодня утром потерял заколку для волос.
translations.pt: Esta manhã perdi a minha mola de cabelo.
translations.he: הבוקר איבדתי את סיכת השיער שלי.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi làm mất cái kẹp tóc.
translations.nl: Ik ben vanmorgen mijn haarspeld kwijtgeraakt.
translations.uk: Я сьогодні вранці загубила заколку для волосся.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैंने अपनी हेयर क्लिप खो दी.
translations.pl: Dziś rano zgubiłam spinkę do włosów.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί έχασα το κλιπ μαλλιών μου.
translations.nb: Jeg mistet hårspennen min i morges.
translations.id: Pagi ini aku kehilangan jepit rambutku.
translations.sv: Jag tappade min hårklämma i morse.
translations.ro: În această dimineață mi-am pierdut agrafa de păr.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno jsem ztratila sponku do vlasů.
translations.da: Jeg mistede mit hårspænde i morges.
translations.ja: 今朝ヘアクリップをなくしました。

tokens.explanation: Elided 1st-person singular subject pronoun before vowel; subject of 'ai'.
Present indicative, 1st-person singular auxiliary forming the passé composé.
Past participle; main lexical verb in compound tense with 'avoir'; takes 'ma pince à cheveux' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st-person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'pince'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP 'pince à cheveux'; direct object of 'perdu'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying purpose/type ('à cheveux').
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of 'pince' via 'à' to form the compound 'pince à cheveux'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'matin' in the time expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; adverbial time complement ('ce matin').

sentences.target: On accroche la photo avec une pince.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ akʁɔʃ la fɔto avɛk yn pɛ̃s/

translations.fr: On accroche la photo avec une pince.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ akʁɔʃ la fɔto avɛk yn pɛ̃s/
translations.en: We hang the photo with a clip.
translations.es: Colgamos la foto con una pinza.
translations.de: Wir hängen das Foto mit einer Klammer auf.
translations.it: Attacchiamo la foto con una molletta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用夹子把照片挂起来。
translations.pt: Penduramos a fotografia com uma mola.
translations.he: אנחנו תולים את התמונה עם אטב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi treo bức ảnh bằng một cái kẹp.
translations.nl: We hangen de foto op met een klem.
translations.hu: A fotót egy csipesszel akasztjuk fel.
translations.hi: हम फोटो को एक क्लिप से टांगते हैं.
translations.el: Κρεμάμε τη φωτογραφία με ένα κλιπ.
translations.nb: Vi henger opp bildet med en klype.
translations.id: Kami menggantung foto dengan sebuah jepitan.
translations.sv: Vi hänger upp fotot med en klämma.
translations.da: Vi hænger billedet op med en klemme.
translations.ja: 写真をクリップで掛けます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 3rd-person singular; main verb of the clause.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'photo'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'accroche'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pince'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'avec' (instrument).

sentences.target: Il manque une pince dans la boîte à outils.
sentences.reading: /il mɑ̃k yn pɛ̃s dɑ̃ la bwat a utij/

translations.fr: Il manque une pince dans la boîte à outils.
translations.ipa: /il mɑ̃k yn pɛ̃s dɑ̃ la bwat a utij/
translations.en: A pair of pliers is missing from the toolbox.
translations.es: Faltan unos alicates en la caja de herramientas.
translations.it: Manca una pinza nella cassetta degli attrezzi.
translations.zh-Hans: 工具箱里少了一把钳子。
translations.ru: В ящике с инструментами не хватает плоскогубцев.
translations.pt: Falta um alicate na caixa de ferramentas.
translations.vi: Trong hộp dụng cụ thiếu một cái kìm.
translations.nl: Er ontbreekt een tang in de gereedschapskist.
translations.uk: У ящику з інструментами бракує плоскогубців.
translations.hi: औज़ार के डिब्बे से एक प्लास गायब है.
translations.pl: W skrzynce z narzędziami brakuje kombinerek.
translations.el: Λείπει μια πένσα από την εργαλειοθήκη.
translations.nb: Det mangler en tang i verktøykassa.
translations.id: Ada satu tang yang hilang dari kotak peralatan.
translations.sv: Det saknas en tång i verktygslådan.
translations.ro: Lipsește un clește din trusa de scule.
translations.cs: V bedně s nářadím chybí jedny kleště.
translations.da: Der mangler en tang i værktøjskassen.
translations.ja: 工具箱からペンチが一丁なくなっている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular pronoun used impersonally as an expletive subject.
Present indicative, 3rd-person singular; intransitive use expressing absence.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pince'.
Common noun, feminine singular; notional subject (the missing item) postposed after the verb in this impersonal construction.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'boîte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP 'la boîte à outils'.
Preposition marking a noun complement ('à outils') specifying the box's contents/purpose.
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of 'boîte' via 'à' ('boîte à outils' = toolbox).
